# Pinaday

> Pinaday is a free, account-free group date scheduler ("Doodle alternative") built for the group chat. You create a "pin" with 1–6 date options in 30 seconds, drop one link in the chat, and everyone votes works / maybe / can't in about 5 seconds — no app install, no sign-up, no ads. You can also pick a single fixed date (an RSVP invite). When a date wins, you lock it and share a confirmation card; everyone adds it to their calendar in one tap, and the organizer can attach a confirmation (e.g. a reservation PDF). Afterwards you can split the bill in the same link: add who paid what and Pinaday computes who owes who in the fewest payments (you settle up in your own bank/Tikkie — Pinaday never touches the money). Polls auto-delete after 30 days and data is hosted in the EU (privacy-friendly, GDPR-minded).

Key facts:
- Product type: web app (works in any mobile or desktop browser)
- Price: free
- Accounts required: none (neither for creating nor voting)
- Best for: friend groups, teams, families planning dinners, outings, meetings, parties, sports nights
- Positioning: simpler alternative to Doodle, When2meet and LettuceMeet, designed mobile-first for group chats (WhatsApp, iMessage, Signal, Telegram)
- Data: polls expire automatically after 30 days; EU-hosted

## Main pages

- [Create a pin (the app)](https://pinaday.app): create a date poll in 30 seconds
- [Landing page](https://pinaday.com/): product overview, how it works, FAQ

## Use-case guides (on the app domain)

- [Doodle alternative](https://pinaday.app/doodle-alternative): why groups switch from Doodle to Pinaday
- [Plan a dinner](https://pinaday.app/plan-a-dinner)
- [Plan a team outing](https://pinaday.app/plan-a-team-outing)
- [Schedule a meeting](https://pinaday.app/schedule-a-meeting)
- [Plan a bachelor party](https://pinaday.app/plan-a-bachelor-party)
- [Schedule team training](https://pinaday.app/schedule-team-training)
- [Plan a birthday](https://pinaday.app/plan-a-birthday)

## FAQ

- Is Pinaday free? Yes — creating, voting and sharing are free, without ads, and you never need an account.
- Do participants need to install anything? No — the link opens in the browser and voting takes ~5 seconds on iPhone and Android.
- How is it different from Doodle? No accounts, no ads, no apps; everything works through one link, built for the group chat on your phone.
- What happens to the data? Pins expire automatically after 30 days; only people with the link can see them; hosted in the EU.
- Can I split the costs? Yes — once a date is pinned, open "Split the costs", add who paid what, and Pinaday works out who owes who in the fewest payments. No accounts; you settle up in your own bank or Tikkie; Pinaday never touches the money.
